content:
🔥 Open-LLM-VTuber | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To create a personal, interactive AI companion with a visual avatar that can be controlled and conversed with using natural voice commands, running locally for privacy and accessibility.
✨ Key Features: • Hands-free voice interaction • Voice interruption • Live2D avatar integration • Local execution (offline support) • Cross-platform compatibility
📖 Summary: Open-LLM-VTuber is a Python-based project enabling hands-free, voice-interactive AI companions with Live2D avatars. It supports real-time conversations, voice interruption, and can run entirely offline on local machines across different platforms.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
